SBC Inspection Report
RPT-2026-05-CE92

2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 41-3.3.4

Visible flexible cable/cord run without concealed sections in damage-prone areas

Bounding box detected at region
Description Coiled electrical cables on floor, not stored in designated area.
SBC Code 41-3.3.4 — Flexible cables and cords in separated circuits shall be visible throughout any part of their length liable to mechanical damage.
Priority MEDIUM
MEDIUM VIO-002 SBC Ref: 704:52-2.8.101

Mechanical protection for cables crossing construction site roads/walkways

Bounding box detected at region
Description Coiled electrical cables on floor, not stored in designated area.
SBC Code 704:52-2.8.101 — Cables should not be run across site roads or walkways. Where necessary, special protection against mechanical damage shall be provided.
Priority MEDIUM
CRITICAL VIO-003 SBC Ref: 61-4.2.2k

Proper cable terminations (no loose/missing lugs)

Bounding box detected at region
Description Worker on ladder handling loose electrical wires. Wires are not secured.
SBC Code 61-4.2.2k — Initial verification inspection shall confirm: adequacy of termination and connection of cables and conductors (no loose wires, proper lug connections).
Priority CRITICAL
CRITICAL VIO-004 SBC Ref: 712:51-4.102

Permanent 'SOLAR DC - Live parts can remain energized' marking on DC-side access points

Bounding box detected at region
Description Open electrical panel with exposed wiring and circuit breakers. Warning signage is not visible.
SBC Code 712:51-4.102 — Each point of access to live parts on the DC side (distribution boards, cabinets) shall have a permanent marking bearing the text 'SOLAR DC - Live parts can remain energized after isolation'.
Priority CRITICAL
HIGH VIO-005 SBC Ref: 712:51-4.106.2

Identification sign adjacent to PV array DC switch disconnector

Bounding box detected at region
Description Open electrical panel with exposed wiring and circuit breakers. Warning signage is not visible.
SBC Code 712:51-4.106.2 — The PV array DC switch disconnector shall be identified by a sign affixed in a prominent location adjacent to the switch disconnector. Where multiple disconnection devices are not ganged, signage shall warn of multiple DC sources.
Priority HIGH
HIGH VIO-006 SBC Ref: 51-4.1

Sign 'ELECTRICAL ROOM' on door

Bounding box detected at region
Description Open electrical panel with exposed wiring and circuit breakers. Warning signage is not visible.
SBC Code 51-4.1 — Doors into electrical control panel rooms shall be marked with a plainly visible and legible sign stating 'electrical room' or similar approved wording.
Priority HIGH

6 51-4.1 Doors into electrical control panel rooms shall be marked with a plainly visible and legible sign stating 'electrical room' or similar approved wording. Violation
